name: The Swines
overview:
In the quirky town of Oinkersfield, the Swinefill family navigates life on Hog Heaven Ranch. Patriarch Jack and his wife June already clash over their chaotic household, but the real trouble begins when their son Sebastian—a disgraced Hoggywood director—returns home.

Sebastian arrives with his posh partner Rodd and business manager Marcus to claim an inheritance: 10,000 acres of land overlapping with his parents' property. What starts as a quick cash-out plan turns into a family circus, pitting the sophisticated outsiders against blue-collar relatives in a hilarious culture clash of champagne and cornbread.
